original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Health care for women subjected to intimate partner violence or sexual violence: a clinical handbook
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: International guidance requiring UAE legal, safeguarding and referral adaptation
original_registry_entry.population: Women subjected to intimate partner violence or sexual violence; the handbook does not directly address people under 18 or men.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Health-care encounters including first-line support, history, examination and documentation.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for survivor-centred first-line support, consent to documentation, recording complaints, symptoms, signs and injuries, and history or examination only when clinically performed. It is not authority for universal screening or automatic reporting in the UAE.

exact_sections.heading: First-line support and LIVES
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports listening, documenting needs and concerns, validating, assessing safety and recording support discussed without asserting abuse or imposing action.

exact_sections.heading: Documenting partner violence
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports asking permission to document and recording complaints, symptoms, signs, injuries and relevant history in the person’s words without interpretation.

exact_sections.heading: History and physical examination after sexual violence
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports respectful, consent-based history and head-to-toe examination documentation only when relevant and performed; sexual-assault care is not generalized to every domestic-violence presentation.

title: Health care for women subjected to intimate partner violence or sexual violence: a clinical handbook
jurisdiction: International guidance requiring UAE legal, safeguarding and referral adaptation
population: Women subjected to intimate partner violence or sexual violence; the handbook does not directly address people under 18 or men.
intended_setting: Health-care encounters including first-line support, history, examination and documentation.
